seo.title: Furina Build Guide — GenshinGuide
seo.description: Complete Furina build guide for Genshin Impact. Best weapons ranked (Splendor of Tranquil Waters, Fleuve Cendre Ferryman), optimal artifacts (Golden Troupe), team compositions, and rotation guide.

tldr_weapon: Splendor of Tranquil Waters (F2P: Fleuve Cendre Ferryman R5)
intro: Furina is one of Genshin's most powerful and flexible supports: team-wide buffer, off-field sub-DPS, and emergency healer. Her kit revolves around HP manipulation — she drains the party's HP to fuel her summons, then converts every point of HP change into a team-wide DMG bonus. She scales entirely with HP, not ATK. This guide covers everything you need to build her optimally.
weapon_bottom_line: Splendor of Tranquil Waters is BiS. Fleuve Cendre Ferryman R5 is free and ~80% as effective. Festering Desire is a strong limited alternative. Only pull the signature if you want to min-max.

weapons.name: Splendor of Tranquil Waters
weapons.notes: Signature. HP + skill DMG when HP changes. Best in slot.

weapons.name: Fleuve Cendre Ferryman R5
weapons.notes: Best F2P. ER substat + skill CRIT rate. Free from fishing.

weapons.name: Festering Desire
weapons.notes: Limited event weapon. Skill DMG + skill CRIT. Great if you have it.

weapons.name: Favonius Sword
weapons.notes: Team energy battery. High ER substat. Lowers Furina's personal DMG.

artifact_why: Furina's damage comes entirely from her Elemental Skill (Salon Members). Golden Troupe grants +70% skill DMG while off-field — which is exactly where Furina spends her time. This is by far her strongest set.
artifact_alt: 4pc Tenacity of the Millelith (full support build — provides team ATK buff, lower personal damage). 2pc Golden Troupe + 2pc HP% (Tenacity/Vourukasha) while farming.

main_stats.sands_note: Furina scales entirely with HP. ATK% is a dead stat. Aim for 35-40k HP.
main_stats.goblet_note: HP% goblet is competitive with Hydro DMG due to Furina's self-buff. Use whichever has better substats.
main_stats.circlet_note: Aim for 1:2 CRIT ratio. ~70% CR, ~140%+ CD. CRIT Rate circlet is usually best.

sub_priority: Energy Recharge (160-180% solo Hydro / 130-150% double Hydro)
Flat HP (low priority, but better than ATK)

teams.name: Team 1: Neuvillette Hypercarry
teams.desc: Neuvillette · Furina · Kazuha · Xilonen. Furina's buff and Hydro Resonance skyrocket Neuvillette's damage. The premier Fontaine team. Consistent, high AoE damage with massive self-sustain.

teams.name: Team 2: Noelle Furina Core
teams.desc: Noelle · Furina · Gorou/Yun Jin · Flex. Noelle's team-wide healing perfectly offsets Furina's HP drain while driving on-field. Surprisingly strong. Budget-friendly.

teams.name: Team 3: Hu Tao Double Hydro
teams.desc: Hu Tao · Furina · Yelan · Jean/Healer. Furina keeps Hu Tao below 50% HP naturally while providing a massive DMG% buff. Hydro Resonance + Yelan for more HP scaling.

rotation_code: Furina E Q → Team Healer (E/Q) → Support Buffs → Main DPS → Refresh Furina E → Repeat
rotation_key: ⚠️ Always start in Ousia (dark/damage) mode. Use E first so Salon Members start draining HP and building Fanfare stacks immediately. Burst amplifies the DMG bonus from those stacks. Always bring a team-wide healer — Furina's HP drain will kill your team otherwise. Refresh E before it expires (30s duration).
mistakes: ❌ Building ATK on Furina. Her entire kit scales with HP. ATK% sands, ATK% weapons, and ATK% substats are wasted stats.
❌ No team-wide healer. Furina drains the entire party's HP. A single-target healer won't keep up. Bring Jean, Baizhu, Xianyun, Charlotte, or a healer on-field DPS.
❌ Leveling Normal Attack talent. Furina's NA has zero scaling relevance. Save your resources for E and Q.
❌ Wrong Energy Recharge. You need 160-180% ER as solo Hydro, or 130-150% with double Hydro. Without enough ER, you can't burst every rotation and your team loses the massive DMG buff.
